message:
test: add ~42 edge-case tests across btree and core crates

20 new tests in ffs-btree (113 total): parse/validate headers,
boundary values, insert/delete invariants, roundtrip encoding.

22 new tests in ffs-core (396 total): DegradationLevel boundary
flags table, FSM hysteresis/escalation/de-escalation, BackpressureGate
decision matrix, RequestOp classification, PressureMonitor lifecycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
